title: Conjunctions
content:
If Jupiter and Saturn meet,
What a cop of mummy wheat!
The sword's a cross; thereon He died:
On breast of Mars the goddess sighed.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Butler Yeats delivers a powerful performance in "Conjunctions"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
